channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wanda Sykes Pulls Off Her First Dramatic Acting Role: See an Emotional Scene from âUndercardâ (Exclusive)
item.description: Sykes costars with Bentley Green, Estella Kahiha, Xavier Millis and Abbott Elementary's William Stanford Davis in 'Undercard,' in theaters Feb. 27

item.title: Hilary Swank Shares Rare Photo of One of Her 2-Year-Old Twins as They Enjoy Ski Trip to Whistler
item.description: The actress shares her twins Aya and Ohm, 2, with husband Philip Schneider

item.title: Benicio del Toro Was 9 When His Mother Died: 'Hasn't Been One Day in My Life That I Haven't Thought About Her'
item.description: 'I'm still dealing with it,' the actor said of the loss of his late mother, Fausta Genoveva SÃ¡nchez Rivera

item.title: MAC Cosmetics Is Hard-Launching Its Debut into Sephora with a Chappell Roan Campaign and the Glam Is Glamming
item.description: Gabbriette and Quenlin Blackwell appear in the campaign with the pop star, who was announced as a global face of the brand in December

item.title: LeBron James Addresses Jaylen Brown's Past Bronny Comments

item.title: President Trump Shares AI Video Punching Canadian Hockey Player, Winning Gold With USA
